untranslatable_reason: The signal requires: (1) calculation of 10-day net price change and comparison to historical average net change (2×threshold) — no allowed indicator directly computes net change over rolling 10-day periods; (2) a 10-day wait period after large move detection — temporal state management not supported; (3) 'congestion level' definition — not defined in source text and no corresponding indicator available; (4) false breakout confirmation requiring sustained violation over 2 days — requires multi-bar pattern logic beyond simple condition evaluation. These require custom preprocessing, state tracking, and pattern detection unavailable in the backtest engine.
translation_notes: Attempted to use Donchian channels as a proxy for congestion levels and breakout detection, but the core logic of large-move detection, wait-period enforcement, and false-breakout confirmation cannot be reliably expressed without indicator support for rolling net-change calculations and temporal sequencing rules.
